name: A novel thermostable PET hydrolase enzyme variant (F218I/S238P) designed by IG-guided active site encoding. The ob3ect encodes a protein fold with enhanced backbone rigidity (G promoted from sequential to broadcast) while preserving the catalytic triad geometry (Ser-Asp-His). Structural type matches the PETase catalytic site O_∞ Frobenius-special tuple but with G=𐑵 (broadcast) for allosteric regulation. The ob3ect self-verifies its catalytic cycle closure via the Frobenius condition μ∘δ=id.

ENGAGR.justification: Simultaneous open/closed conformations during substrate binding

phase_3.false_description: Denatured protein with lost catalytic activity
phase_3.both_description: Allosteric intermediate with simultaneous open/closed states
